description_long: This is a slice of chocolate cake with a rich, dark brown color and three round, reddish-brown decorations on top, likely representing cherries or truffles. The cake features three distinct horizontal layers, separated by slightly lighter bands of chocolate filling or frosting. The surface of the cake is smooth and matte, with clean, angular edges and a triangular wedge shape. The top is flat, providing a stable area for the decorative elements. There are no visible candles or additional decorations, giving the cake a minimalist and modern appearance. The cake is not displayed on any plate or stand, appearing to rest directly on a flat surface.
description: A triangular slice of chocolate cake with three round decorations on top and three visible layers, finished in a smooth, matte chocolate style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat face of the cake slice and the three round decorations on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the three distinct horizontal layers and the wedge shape of the cake.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pointed end of the cake slice and the arrangement of the decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the layered structure and the smooth, unadorned surface.
